name: felix
description: Use the live Felix CLI to build, assess, and maintain agent ecosystems.

interface.shortDescription: Use Felix to build and maintain agent ecosystems.
interface.longDescription: Felix is an Eidos AGI Codex plugin that routes agent-building, scaffold, maintainer, standards, and repo-health work to the installed Felix CLI. Felix is CLI-first: Codex should use the CLI's progressive reveal instead of duplicating the agent-building method in prompt memory.
defaultPrompt: Use Felix to plan this new agent.
Ask Felix what standards this agent should inherit.
Use Felix to check whether this agent repo is healthy.
